_meta.official_75_note: NBA 75th Anniversary Team has 76 players because of a voting tie; this file uses those 76 plus 24 extras.
_meta.chinese_national_special_note: Chinese-national players are developer-favor exceptions: every remaining quality level from rookie upward is enabled and GOAT cards use full five-stat attributes.
_meta.rule_note: All selected stars get rookie, starter, and core cards. Sixth-man cards are only added for real sixth-man history. Award tiers are driven by recorded awards/teams plus a small manual FMVP/legend set. Chinese-national special players override the normal rule.
